value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: Type-safety: ZERO 'as any', ': any', '<any>', '@ts-expect-error/@ts-ignore', or 'eslint-disable' in src/. Excellent. 39 'as unknown as' casts (mostly Record<string,unknown> widening which is centralized in item-record.ts). 6 non-null '!' assertions all in update.ts (1600,1637,1775,1807,1810,1849) guarded by prior option checks.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: Deps all justified+used: @sentry/node (lazy via dynamic import in instrument.ts:216), commander (10 files), fast-glob (only linked-artifacts.ts:3), fast-json-patch (4 history/restore files), @toon-format/toon (2 files). No unused deps. No heavy eager imports.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: DUP1 (med): per-event field validation/assembly duplicated ~40 lines between create.ts parseEvents and update.ts parseEventEntries (start/end/duration + title/desc/location/timezone empty-checks + recurrence). Differs only in wrapper (explicitEmpty) and recurrence mode arg. Extract shared parseSingleEvent into recurrence-parsers/event-validation-messages.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: DUP2 (low): '[...new Set(raw.split(",").map(trim).filter(len>0))]' comma-list dedup idiom hand-rolled in bundled-catalog.ts:272, update-many.ts:336, aggregate.ts:106, list.ts, get.ts, search.ts, plan.ts:308. Add splitCommaList() to core/item/parse.ts.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: COMPLEXITY (high): runUpdate() update.ts:1102 spans ~834 lines single fn; runCreate() create.ts:670 ~670 lines; runPmCli() main.ts:357 ~357 lines. All three are giant orchestrators mixing parse/validate/mutate/output. Already in vitest exclude. Split into staged sub-steps.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: DEAD/over-export (low-med): help-json-payload.ts exports 11 fns but only 2 (maybeRenderBootstrapJsonHelp, attachCreateUpdatePolicyHelpText) are imported by main.ts; the other 9 (buildJsonHelpPayload, buildHelpOptionSummaries, compactHelpOptionAliases, buildOptionAliasMap, resolveCommandFromPathTokens, extractOptionValueName, readOptionAttributeName, buildHelpArgumentSummaries, buildHelpSubcommandSummaries, buildCreateUpdatePolicyHelpText) are internal-only and untested. Drop 'export'. Same pattern in registration-helpers.ts (pushOptionalValueFlag/pushOptionalBooleanFlag/pushRepeatableValueFlag/UPDATE_MANY_CONTROL_OPTION_KEYS internal-only).

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: MONOLITHS (med): cli-contracts.ts 1805 LOC is 62 inline export blocks (NOT a barrel despite cli-contracts/ subdir holding commander-mutation-options/enum-contracts/tool-parameter-tables/tool-option-contracts). More contract groups could move into the subdir. completion.ts 1855 LOC: bash 121-336, zsh 337-1174 (~837 lines!), fish 1175-end; flags ARE derived from *_FLAG_CONTRACTS (good) but the 3 generators each re-walk the data with shell-specific emit. telemetry/runtime.ts 1571 LOC / 60 internal fns. loader.ts 1929 LOC.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: TESTS (low): tests/integration/cli.integration.spec.ts is 6991 LOC in ONE flat describe (70 it() E2E spawns). Organization smell, not pure dup; some alias scenarios (--ac, snake_case) also unit-tested in create/update specs (acceptable defense-in-depth). Consider splitting integration spec by surface.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: TYPES (low): ItemFrontMatter is @deprecated('Use ItemMetadata') in types.ts:473 but still used at 60+ non-test sites (item-store, context, search, calendar, list, deps, close, get, update). The deprecation tag is misleading/unactioned: either migrate to ItemMetadata or drop the @deprecated. front_matter_key @deprecated also still read in runtime-schema.ts:182 + validated in settings-validator.ts:216.

value.author: code-quality-agent
value.text: POSITIVES: packages already share SDK import primitives (toImportPriority/Tags/Status, ensureTrackerInitialized, commitImportedItem in src/sdk/package-import-adapters.ts) - no importer dup. toItemRecord widening centralized in core/item/item-record.ts. parseTags/parseCsvKv/recurrence/legacy-none all shared. No TODO/FIXME/HACK in src. No dead constant branches. No unused deps. Sentry lazy. The reverse 'as unknown as ItemMetadata' (9x: replay.ts 35/51, plan.ts 612/665/680/712/785, restore.ts 259/348) is the only un-centralized cast - add toItemMetadata() inverse helper next to toItemRecord.

patch.value: Read-only code-quality audit complete: src/ type-safety is excellent (0 any/ts-ignore/eslint-disable; deps all used+justified). Top actionable items: 3 giant orchestrator fns (runUpdate ~834L, runCreate ~670L, runPmCli ~357L), event-parse dup between create/update, comma-split idiom dup, over-exported help-json-payload/registration-helpers internals, un-centralized ItemMetadata casts, misleading @deprecated ItemFrontMatter still used 60+x.
